breaches.label: FBYY
breaches.source: 723 sh short · Binding: median vol (30% × 800 60d med = 240 sh cap) (301% of cap) · Other: shares-out (35% × 30,001 out = 10,500 sh cap) (7% of cap)
breaches.action: Cut ~531 sh on FBYY to reach warn band (483 sh over median vol (30% × 800 60d med = 240 sh cap)).

breaches.label: MAAY
breaches.source: 2,269 sh short · Binding: median vol (30% × 8,400 60d med = 2,520 sh cap) (90% of cap) · Other: shares-out (35% × 390,001 out = 136,500 sh cap) (2% of cap)
breaches.action: Trim ~253 sh on MAAY toward warn band (2,269 sh short vs 2,520 sh median vol (30% × 8,400 60d med = 2,520 sh cap)).

breaches.label: MTYY
breaches.source: 6,965 sh short · Binding: median vol (30% × 16,750 60d med = 5,025 sh cap) (139% of cap) · Other: shares-out (35% × 650,001 out = 227,500 sh cap) (3% of cap)
breaches.action: Cut ~2,945 sh on MTYY to reach warn band (1,940 sh over median vol (30% × 16,750 60d med = 5,025 sh cap)).

indices.description: T+0: instantaneous portfolio β×ΔSPX. 1M–12M: horizon-scaled equity shock (rms) + LETF decay/borrow. 12M-terminal row uses full labeled ΔSPX. Historical rows integrate piecewise SPX paths.

vix_decay_matrix.description: Expected vol-driven decay over the next 12 months at SPX 0%, with forecast vol adjusted by vol elasticity (v3 log-log), variance decomposition, and optional spike-revert path integral. Borrow excluded (assumed unchanged across scenarios).
